summary: Iteration 5 (Business Idea Library) — frontend-only testing. All 14 review checks PASS. /ideas renders 30 cards anonymously; bucket filters (local-physical=12, hybrid=9, digital=6, future=3), sector, district, beginner toggle and search all filter correctly. /ideas/soil-testing-micro-lab renders full detail with all sections, idea-ideal-* chips, Investment stats Min/Med/Adv, monthly revenue banner, district chips, share button, and idea-start-cta linking to /opportunities/new with prefilled title/category=agri/skills query params. /ideas/non-existent-slug shows idea-not-found empty state. Landing nav-ideas + hero-cta-ideas + AppNavbar nav-public-ideas all link to /ideas. Source verified: /opportunities/new prefill banner (post-prefilled-banner) renders when title or skills query present, and form fields (post-title, post-category, post-skills) bind from useSearchParams. Onboarding SKILL_SUGGESTIONS (53 items) includes every required skill; INTEREST_SUGGESTIONS contains 'Women-Led'. Middleware does NOT gate /ideas or /ideas/[slug]. Bharat balance verified by sampling 5 ideas — district_fit exclusively uses Telangana + AP priority districts. Bucket counts in IDEAS source match exactly 12/9/6/3.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: /app/frontend/app/ideas/page.js IdeaCard renders idea.bucket.replace('-', ' ') which only replaces first hyphen — works fine since bucket ids have at most one hyphen ('local-physical'), but consider replaceAll for safety.
Minor: District filter chip row may overflow on small screens (horizontal scroll already enabled, acceptable).
Sector list (14 sectors) displayed inline-scroll without grouping — acceptable for MVP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Idea Library is static JSON at /app/frontend/lib/idea-library.js (30 ideas: 12 local-physical, 9 hybrid, 6 digital, 3 future). Public routes /ideas and /ideas/[slug] are NOT auth-gated. /opportunities/new prefill via useSearchParams works (auth-gated; verify via source). Live UI run confirmed all filters, search, detail page, share, 404 state, navbar links.
